# Marshborne

Being part of a marshborne community means you were shaped by unforgiving wetlands, where survival depends on knowing how to find and use what others would overlook.

## Features

**Forager’s Instinct:** Once per session, you can make a Knowledge Roll to quickly gather or improvise a natural item from your surroundings that could aid your current situation. Work with the GM to determine what you create.

> **Design notes:** While this may seem similar to Wanderborne at first glance, the intent here is different. Marshborne focuses on finding and making use of what the environment provides in the moment, rather than having something prepared ahead of time. It emphasizes improvisation and practical knowledge of a harsh, resource-scarce landscape.
